description: A brightly lit architectural scene depicting the white marble tomb of Sheikh Salim Chishti within the courtyard of Fatehpur Sikri. The tomb structure features intricate marble lattice screens (jali work) with geometric and floral patterns, supported by carved columns beneath an overhanging white roof. To the right stands a red sandstone gateway or mosque entrance with an arched doorway and ornate decorations. Two small white-robed figures sit at the base of the tomb. The sky above is a vivid clear blue. Elaborate tile mosaic borders run along the lower portion of the tomb.

_meta.title: Tomb of Sheikh Salim Chishti in Fatehpur Sikri
